_note: Wave-2 Round-3 LANDED harness (2026-07-10). The 2 keep-structure navs. mega-menu is colour-only (no box family) -> inline-scan only, with a background+text colour set to prove the colour support serialises scoped not inline. mobile-nav (singleton drawer) -> asymmetric padding base {5,17,9,23} + tablet {4,12,6,16} / mobile {2,8,4,10} on #sgs-mobile-nav, plus inline-scan of the whole drawer subtree.
